title: Special method exit should not re-raise the provided exception
description: A special method should not re-raise the provided exception.
message: Special method exit should not re-raise the provided exception.

noncompliant.description: Exiting `__del__` method raises an exception that was provided.

compliant.description: Exiting `__del__` method raises a new exception.

why_is_this_an_issue: Re-raising the provided exception can lead to unclear error messages and inconsistent behavior.
how_to_fix: Raise a new exception instead of re-raising the provided one.

metadata.title: Special method exit should not re-raise the provided exception
